section: Optimization of Process Conditions for Ultralightweight Steel with More Than 13 wt% of Al and 5 wt% of Cr
subject: Optimization of Process Conditions for Ultralightweight Steel with More Than 13 wt% of Al and 5 wt% of Cr
claim: # Optimization of Process Conditions for Ultralightweight Steel with More Than 13 wt% of Al and 5 wt% of Cr Kyeong-Won Kim, Sung-Dae Kim, Seong-Jun Park, Hyungkwon Park, Joonoh Moon, Hyun-UK Hong, and Chang-Hoon Lee* An ultralightweight Fe–30Mn–13.
evidence_text: # Optimization of Process Conditions for Ultralightweight Steel with More Than 13 wt% of Al and 5 wt% of Cr Kyeong-Won Kim, Sung-Dae Kim, Seong-Jun Park, Hyungkwon Park, Joonoh Moon, Hyun-UK Hong, and Chang-Hoon Lee* An ultralightweight Fe–30Mn–13.

section: Optimization of Process Conditions for Ultralightweight Steel with More Than 13 wt% of Al and 5 wt% of Cr
subject: Optimization of Process Conditions for Ultralightweight Steel with More Than 13 wt% of Al and 5 wt% of Cr
claim: 6C–5Cr steel, which contains more than 13 wt% of Al and thereby reduces the density by 20%, is developed.
evidence_text: 6C–5Cr steel, which contains more than 13 wt% of Al and thereby reduces the density by 20%, is developed.

subject: 1. Introduction
claim: In this study, it was aimed to manufacture ultralightweight Fe–Mn–Al–C steel containing more than 13 wt% of Al which can reduce 20% of density by suppressing the formation of brittle coarse κ-carbide, ferrite, and ordered phases at grain boundaries through the addition of Cr and optimization of hot rolling and heat treatment conditions.
evidence_text: In this study, it was aimed to manufacture ultralightweight Fe–Mn–Al–C steel containing more than 13 wt% of Al which can reduce 20% of density by suppressing the formation of brittle coarse κ-carbide, ferrite, and ordered phases at grain boundaries through the addition of Cr and optimization of hot rolling and heat treatment conditions.

subject: 2. Results and Discussion
claim: However, the water-quenched specimen shows excellent tensile property with 1048 MPa of tensile strength and 38% of total elongation due to uniform microstructure with austenite and fine κ-carbide inside austenite matrix and very small fraction of $\mathrm { D O } _ { 3 }$ phase.
evidence_text: However, the water-quenched specimen shows excellent tensile property with 1048 MPa of tensile strength and 38% of total elongation due to uniform microstructure with austenite and fine κ-carbide inside austenite matrix and very small fraction of $\mathrm { D O } _ { 3 }$ phase.

subject: 3. Conclusions
claim: Experimental Section An ultralightweight steel with Fe–30Mn–13.
evidence_text: Experimental Section An ultralightweight steel with Fe–30Mn–13.
